summary: Coach Management Page testing completed successfully. All backend CRUD endpoints (GET/PUT/DELETE /api/coaches) and frontend UI features (tabs, edit modal, actions menu, confirm dialog) are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: InvitesPage.js line 500: useEffect has missing dependencies warning - consider adding fetchCoaches, fetchInvites, fetchPendingAssignments, and role to dependency array
coaches.py: Good implementation with proper role checking (director only), athlete count aggregation, and status validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Management page at /invites route is fully functional. Director role must be selected via role switcher. One registered coach 'Douglas Coach' (douglas.gmns@gmail.com) with team 'TEST_Varsity'. One pending invite for 'Test Coach' (testcoach@capymatch.com) with 'Send failed' status.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/coaches: PASS - Returns list of coaches with athlete counts
backend_endpoints.GET /api/coaches/{id}: PASS - Returns single coach with athletes list
backend_endpoints.DELETE /api/coaches/{id}: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent (not tested actual delete to preserve data)

frontend_ui.coach_card: PASS - Shows name, email, status badge, team, athlete count, join date
frontend_ui.edit_coach_modal: PASS - Opens with name/team inputs and save/cancel buttons
frontend_ui.coach_menu_dropdown: PASS - Shows Deactivate and Remove Coach options
frontend_ui.confirm_dialog: PASS - Appears before removing coach with Cancel/Confirm buttons
frontend_ui.invites_tab_content: PASS - Shows pending invites and history sections
frontend_ui.status_badges: PASS - ACTIVE, PENDING, ACCEPTED badges display correctly
